specific_question: How do business representatives of MediConn Solutions use the Customer Relationship Management system as of January 2025?
answer: According to a January 2025 survey, business associates at Mediconn Solutions primarily used the CRM system to manage patient information and to organize marketing strategies. As of January 2025, no representatives indicated that they knew the CRM system has capabilities of analysis which would help drive sales into 2026.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions from March 2025, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending. What kind of business data can this software analyze, which would aid in the growth of Mediconn Solutions' virtual healthcare clientele going into the year 2026?
